name: Authentication and Authorization
description: Authentication and Authorization process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD
N1["User Request"]
N2["Credentials/Token"]
N3["Identity Provider"]
N4["Choose Approach"]

N7["Authorize Action"]
N8["Decision"]
N9["Integrate Results"]

N2 --> N3
N3 --> N4
N4 --> N5
N4 --> N7
N5 --> N6
N7 --> N8
N6 --> N9
